security.comment: Restrictive CSP — Chart.js and fonts must be vendored locally (BUILD_SPEC §7). No remote hosts.
security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

macOS.comment: Developer ID signing identity + notarization creds injected via CI env (BUILD_SPEC §7, §0.5 #16).

bundle.comment-linux: Linux is packaged as a Flatpak via src-tauri/flatpak/com.munim.app.yml, not a Tauri linux target.

updater.comment: macOS ONLY (disabled on Linux — Flatpak owns updates). Fill pubkey from the minisign keypair; endpoint is a GitHub Release asset. BUILD_SPEC §7.
